title: dimocarpus longan subsp. malesianus
intro: Dimocarpus longan subsp. malesianus, also known as the Longan tree, is a subspecies of the Longan fruit tree native to Southeast Asia, specifically in Malaysia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dimocarpus longan subsp. malesianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the fruit, leaves, or bark, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
